steps.t: Teilo Gwyniad is sitting on the pier in Lhan Garan. Teilo Gwyniad motioned for you to speak with him.
There are racks of drying fish on the pier in Lhan Garan. Teilo Gwyniad asked you to salt racks of fish on the pier.
You have finished salting the fish as asked. Return to Madog on the pier in Lhan Garan.
